programme.desc: Araki Murashige launches a rebellion. Acting on his own, Kanbei goes to persuade him, only to be taken captive. As rumors spread that Kanbei has betrayed them, Nobunaga orders that Kanbei's son, who is under Nene's care in Nagahama, be put to death. Hanbei proposes a plan to save the child to the hesitant Hideyoshi and Koichiro. But as Hanbei heads to Nagahama, entrusted with carrying out the order, he harbors another plan of his own.

programme.title: Can Goodluck Jonathan Rescue Nigeria? Pdp's 2027 Gamble Under Scrutiny
programme.desc: Goodluck Jonathan is back - or is he? programme.title: Asap Xp[Live]
programme.desc: ASAP XP is the rebranded version of the Philippines' longest-running musical variety show, ASAP (All-Star Sunday Afternoon Party). Now redesigned as a primetime “concert experience,” ASAP XP brings together top OPM icons, rising stars, and fan-favorite performers in a high-energy weekly showcase.

programme.title: The Iron Heart
programme.desc: The Iron Heart follows Apollo Adelantar, an undercover operative with a traumatic past who is assigned to infiltrate a powerful crime syndicate. As he goes deeper into his dangerous mission, Apollo is forced to confront painful truths about his identity, loyalty, and family-especially when trusted allies turn into enemies. Fueled by vengeance, justice, and his desire to protect the innocent, Apollo and his companions face relentless trials that test not only their strength but also their moral convictions.

programme.title: Goin' Bulilit S15[Live]
programme.desc: A gag show with child actors playing adult roles, doing gags, sketches and segments. Instead of playing roles based on their own age, child actors are made to portray adult characters like Doctors, Teachers, Married Couples, etc.

programme.desc: Duggee and the squirrels are going camping and they hear a scary noise outside the tent!

programme.desc: The Squirrel club play games involving animals. The chickens do some rhythmic office work.

programme.title: E20 - Mystery Seeds
programme.desc: When Duggee finds some seeds it's time for some gardening!

programme.title: E36 - Backpackers
programme.desc: Mum and Dad are going on an adventure wearing the kids as their cheeky backpacks! Seeing the sights and buying street food, backpacking is a blast - until they lose their passports.

programme.desc: Why do my feet hurt?', Tag asks Duggee. While Duggee has a think, he tells them 'why' is a great question, and the Squirrels are quick to follow up.

programme.desc: The Heelers and Lucky's family get together to watch the big game, a fun family experiences that gets a little tense.

programme.title: E40 - Relax
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo would rather explore their holiday hotel room than relax on the beach.

programme.title: E2 - Evil Pea's Big Freeze
programme.desc: Evil Pea freezes the veggies so she can take over the whole supermarket. Chilli's heat unfreezes Supertato who then races on lolly-stick skis to thwart Evil Pea and save the day.

programme.desc: Duggee is playing with his train set. Choo-choo! It's amazing! The squirrels are curious and want to know all about it.

programme.desc: The Teletubbies are about to go on the Tubby Custard Ride with the hat, bag, ball and scooter when they realise there is not enough room. The Noo-Noo looks after their things.

programme.title: E20 - Snow
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'snow', and goes on a whirlwind word adventure. They see lots of snow, cold snow, falling snow, twinkly snow and yummy snow.

programme.title: E24 - Wobbly Tower
programme.desc: When Mayor Oki wants to build a new tower, Messy is keen to help. There is just one problem - all his towers fall over...

programme.title: E37 - The Swoppiton Duck
programme.desc: Mojo and Bo need Ted's help to pull a wobbly duck statue up Swoppiton Hill. But does Ted know the best way? And will there be anything left of the duck when they get there?

programme.title: E37 - The Decider
programme.desc: The Heelers and Lucky's family get together to watch the big game, a fun family experiences that gets a little tense.

programme.title: E11 - The Cheerleading Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels find Duggee's cheerleader pompoms, so he shows them his old moves. Time to practice: Duggee at the chess board, the Squirrels as a squad. There's a big match ahead...

programme.desc: The Squirrel club play games involving animals. The chickens do some rhythmic office work.

programme.title: E12 - The Leaning Tower Of Pisa, Italy
programme.desc: The Go Jetters race to fix the Leaning Tower of Pisa, but has it really been glitched?

programme.title: E31 - Work
programme.desc: In a game of 'Work', Dad hires Bluey and Bingo at his drainpipe factory. But when Bluey takes charge, Dad finds his new boss pretty tough, especially her no dancing rule.

programme.title: E34 - Cafe
programme.desc: In the park, Bluey meets a new playmate named Winnie, but when Bluey wants to invite her and her dad home for breakfast, she learns that adults take a little bit longer to make friends.

programme.title: E2 - Obstacle Course
programme.desc: Chilli sets up an obstacle course in the backyard, but Bluey is disheartened when Bandit turns it into a race and beats her. After cheating in a rematch, Bluey discovers the importance of training in order to improve her skills.

programme.title: E25 - Andy And The Marine Iguanas
programme.desc: When Mr Hammond tasks Andy with making sure the marine iguanas are clean for their inspection, Andy isn't sure what they need in order to do that.

programme.title: E6 - Peas
programme.desc: Bella and Lift visit the Fortress of Fun, where Kingsley and Queenie have fun looking for peas with the Playtimers in their Pea Party game.

programme.title: E7 - The Other Big Engine
programme.desc: While working on the Brazilian Railway, Thomas Meets Gustavo, another big blue engine who reminds him of Gordon back home.

programme.title: E17 - Cake Decorate
programme.desc: Cake decides to teach Sarah and Duck how to decorate with icing!

programme.title: E32 - Tradies
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo hide under the house and spy on two mysterious tradies working in the backyard, wondering what they're up to.

programme.title: E33 - Granny Mobile
programme.desc: Muffin is playing Grouchy Granny at a garage sale, making Dad push her on an old mobility scooter, but when a real Grouchy Granny wants to buy it, Muffin won't budge.

programme.desc: Duggee is reading the Squirrels one of his favourite comics.

programme.title: E229
programme.desc: CHINA INSIGHT: China Insight is a captivating series that offers foreign hosts the opportunity to travel and observe the dynamic scenes of China's contemporary society. The series aims to showcase the significant transformations taking place in various aspects such as politics, economy, technology, and culture.
News Talk: News Talk is packed with subjective, authoritative and unique facts, treating the viewer to a detailed, incisive and informative news feature.

programme.title: E390
programme.desc: PHOENIX SUPER DOCTORS: Phoenix Super Doctors is a cross-media health science popularization program. It precisely targets core audiences aged 25-65, including business leaders, middle-class, white-collar workers and highly educated individuals. Centered on trending health topics, the program integrates the wisdom of traditional Chinese medicine with cutting-edge achievements in modern Western medicine. Featuring a top-tier expert team led by academicians, it delivers an immersive, virtual-real blended audiovisual experience through XR virtual scenarios and AI-powered intelligent graphics.
News Talk: News Talk is packed with subjective, authoritative and unique facts, treating the viewer to a detailed, incisive and informative news feature.

programme.title: Outremer.story:2023-2024
programme.desc: A journey a world away from the usual tourist hotspots for an immersive visit to Overseas France. Men and women, each treasuring a deep attachment to their land, act as our guides for this unique exploration of Overseas France and all the wealth of its culture, environment and heritage.

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil S8
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.title: E19 - Special Objects
programme.desc: In Marseille, Anne-Catherine Verwaerde visits the woodworking workshop of Carles and Demarquet. She then goes to the workshop of Senimo, a carpenter in Ivry-sur-Seine.

programme.title: E3 - Seal, Indicator Of Social Change

programme.title: E301 - The Crew Builds A Vet Clinic
programme.desc: When the traveling veterinarian Dr. Diwa can't finish all her checkups in Builder Cove in time, Rubble & Crew know just what to do.

programme.title: E203 - Summer Camp I
programme.desc: Barbapapa and Barbamama have announced to their dear barbababies that they are going on a trip to Easter Island.

programme.title: E108 - Piggy In The Middle
programme.desc: Peppa teaches George how to catch a ball, and later, they play Monkey in the Middle with Mummy Pig.

programme.title: E307 - The Crew Builds A Firefighter Training Center / The Crew Builds A Sierra Sp
programme.desc: When Motor needs help at the fire station, a new Fire Captain comes to town to help train all the pups as new firefighter recruits. // Charger can't wait to help Sierra Sparkle with her big show! Well, until his hurt paw causes a cone complication.

programme.title: E308 - The Crew Builds A Giant Duck Plane / The Crew Builds A Vet Room For Motor
programme.desc: A flock of migrating ducks settles in Builder Cove! It's up to Rubble & Crew to help the ducks start moving south. // Motor doesn't want to visit Dr. Diwa at the Vet Clinic... so the pups build a special space just for her!

programme.title: E206 - Partly Claudia / Ranita's Magic Stripes
programme.desc: Dora and Boots take Claudia, an energetic young rain cloud, to rain on a dry water slide. / Boots gets a case of Tickle Tail that Ranita the Frog can cure if she gets her magic stripes by helping friends around the Rainforest.

programme.title: E120 - Relay Tales / The Barbababies' World
programme.desc: Barbalib, Barbalala and Barbabelle take turns as narrators to tell a story, each one bringing a very personal touch to it. // The Barbapapa family spends a day at the beach. Divided into 2 teams, the barbababies fight over a sandy peninsula.

programme.title: E121 - Greedyguts / Where Is Bali?
programme.desc: A goat has escaped from the mountain and is coming to wreak havoc, devouring everything in its path! // Bali is nowhere to be found, and the Barbapapa deploy all their imagination to look for her. They have no idea that a nice surprise awaits them!

programme.title: E123 - Barba TV / The Museum
programme.desc: The barbababies are glued to the TV. Since they love it so much, their parents encourage them to make their own shows. // The Barbapapa visit the museum of evolution. On the program: creation of the Earth, Precambrian submarine and... dinosaurs!

programme.title: E125 - Barbabravo Is Not Feeling Well / Be Patient Barbabravo...
programme.desc: Following a misadventure, Barbabravo is unable to transform at all. The whole family unites to help him. // Barbabravo can't stay put and is unable to focus one an activity for very long. Barbalala offers to teach him control. Will she succeed?

programme.title: E110 - The Crew Builds A Pig Barn / The Crew Builds A Giant Runway
programme.desc: A new farmer in town asks Rubble & Crew to build a barn for her pig! But will it be done in time for the big Pig Party? // Motor's super special birthday present gets delayed when the pups realize Builder Cove's airport needs a bigger runway.

programme.title: E409 - Dora's Mermaid Adventure / Mermazing Surprise
programme.desc: Dora and Boots become mermaids and help Marisol the Mermaid save her home, Sirena Sea! // Dora and Boots go across the sea to help their dolphin friend find the best gift ever, a magic jewel!

programme.title: E206 - Roadtrip / Tickets / Talent Show
programme.desc: The Rex family go on a road trip through the galaxy to get to Rocket World // Tim & Kai compete to get Terri's spare Space-Land ticket // Tim, Tia & Tommy decide to put on a talent show, but then they can't decide who should go first...

programme.title: E406 - The Crew Builds A Meow Yard
programme.desc: Cafe Carl's kittens cause construction chaos in the Bark Yard! Can the crew create a conclusion to the cat catastrophe?

programme.title: E204 - Pups Save The Diving Bell / Pups Save The Beavers
programme.desc: While the Turbots are deep sea diving, their diving bell ends up stuck! PAW Patrol to the rescue! // A storm washes away a beaver's dam, so he chomps all the wood at Farmer Yumi's! The PAW Patrol arrives to help rebuild his home!

programme.title: E805 - Recorders
programme.desc: The children have a music lesson with Madame Gazelle and all learn how to play the recorder.

programme.title: E125 - Barbabravo Is Not Feeling Well / Be Patient Barbabravo...
programme.desc: Following a misadventure, Barbabravo is unable to transform at all. The whole family unites to help him. // Barbabravo can't stay put and is unable to focus one an activity for very long. Barbalala offers to teach him control. Will she succeed?

programme.title: E407 - The Crew Builds A Giant Checkerboard
programme.desc: Coach Karima is throwing Checkers Day for all the Builder Cove kids! But when everyone can't play together, Rubble & Crew save the day with construction.

programme.desc: Cafe Carl's kittens cause construction chaos in the Bark Yard! Can the crew create a conclusion to the cat catastrophe?

Autour du monde : le journal[Live]
programme.desc: Les informations qui font la une aux quatre coins du monde sont décryptées à travers des reportages, des analyses approfondies et le travail de correspondants internationaux. Un regard global et complet sur l'actualité pour mieux comprendre les événements qui façonnent notre époque.

programme.title: Autour du monde : le journal[Live]

Un regard global et complet sur l'actualité pour mieux comprendre les événements qui façonnent notre époque.

programme.title: Reporters
programme.desc: Avec les équipes de France 24 et les grands reporters aux quatre coins du monde, une découverte des reportages long format sur des sujets d'actualité internationale.

programme.title: Au coeur de l'info : le journal[Live]
programme.desc: Une immersion au cœur de l'information pour analyser les faits marquants du jour et en comprendre les implications. L'émission propose également des éclairages sur les grands enjeux internationaux, afin d'offrir une lecture claire et approfondie de l'actualité mondiale.

programme.title: À l'affiche

Executive Decisions
programme.desc: ‘Executive Decisions' is a CNBC podcast offering a rare window into the minds of top decision-makers. Hosted by Steve Sedgwick, each episode explores the pivotal choices that shape the careers and legacies of business leaders and policymakers. Through candid conversations about risk, doubt and conviction, the series reminds us that even the most powerful face uncertainty and trade-offs.

programme.title: The CNBC Debate
programme.desc: The CNBC Debate leverages CNBC's unparalleled reach to the world's most influential people and gets them to debate the most important issues of our time. This panel discussion format brings together heads of state, policy makers and business leaders onto one stage for a discussion like no other.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: “American Greed” goes inside the dark side of the American Dream - where money seduces, power corrupts, and smooth criminals will stop at nothing to get rich.

programme.title: Late Night With Seth Meyers
programme.desc: Emmy Award-nominated “Late Night with Seth Meyers,” hosted by award-winning writer and performer Seth Meyers, is home to incisive humor, topical jokes and A-list celebrity guests. The series' signature “A Closer Look” segment has garnered millions of views and is widely lauded for its tightly written and thoughtful approach to analyzing and satirizing news of the day.

programme.title: Executive Decisions
programme.desc: ‘Executive Decisions' is a CNBC podcast offering a rare window into the minds of top decision-makers. Hosted by Steve Sedgwick, each episode explores the pivotal choices that shape the careers and legacies of business leaders and policymakers. Through candid conversations about risk, doubt and conviction, the series reminds us that even the most powerful face uncertainty and trade-offs.

programme.title: The CNBC Debate

E13

programme.title: E2 - Tidal Territory
programme.desc: Battle for dominion over the river with crocs, then catch glimpses of an ultra-rare mangrove snake and an endangered nabarlek wallaby. Take to the ocean to see humpback whale mothers raise their calves, then be hunted by false killer whales.

programme.title: E1 - Sirga, Loki and Hugger
programme.desc: Walk on the wild side with Sirga the lion, whose human pal, Val, has been by her side since she was an orphaned cub. See Loki the raven entertain his BFF Elliott, cuddle with Hugger the stingray, and see why Trish and Garri the koala are like family.

programme.title: E3 - Hide and Seek
programme.desc: Contend with the challenges of the rainy season, which turns everything green and spoils the lions’ camouflage. Watch Einstein fail to make new connections and weigh the pros and cons when Keeza and her cub are kidnapped by rival male Mad-Eye Moody.

programme.title: E4 - Family Dynamics
programme.desc: Say hello to a season of plenty as flood waters recede and vast herds of prey return to the Chobe’s banks. Watch Keeza and her cub make a break for it while Caller and Tom Tom brawl with their enemies, then cheer when Einstein finally finds a mate.

programme.desc: From mad rulers like Caligula and Ivan the Terrible to dictators like Mao Zedong and Saddam Hussein, who killed by the millions, these are history's deadliest tyrants.

programme.title: E327 - Radioactive Rust
programme.desc: A retired Air Force general reveals the story of his American Dream. Meanwhile, Robbie and Danielle are dazzled by the glow of a rare collection of radioactive glass.

programme.title: E237 - The Top Ten Mysteries Of The Deep
programme.desc: Ancient Aliens is counting down the top ten mysteries of the deep, from sunken continents to puzzling ruins on the ocean floor and even artefacts that might be remnants of Atlantis.

programme.title: E4 - Tyrants

programme.title: E8 - The Santa That America Built
programme.desc: Santa Claus is one of the most beloved figures-and famous faces-on Earth, a symbol of hope and goodwill for all. But how did this third-century saint become the Santa we know today?

programme.title: E1 - Bicol Burning
programme.desc: Jaime finds her way barred by the deadly volcano Mount Mayon. As she travels around it, she meets locals who challenge her with Bicol's spicy food, not knowing that her spice tolerance is remarkably high.

programme.title: E1 - Jim Kylam (Montreuil)/Pony And Pierre Sauvage (Montreal)
programme.desc: Richard Orlinski meets the self-taught visual artist Jim Kylam, in his studio in Montreuil, on the outskirts of Paris. Invitation to a free interpretation of his works, which combine symbols and ideograms. In Quebec, immersion in Montreal's artistic hub: Pony transforms his personal experiences into heart-warming creations, notably through his 'toutous'; Pierre Sauvage is passionate about urban art and founded a clothing brand that combines art and social commitment, in collaboration with local artists.

programme.title: E127
programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment. Reports from the regions and special subjects in the studio offer an easy way to better understand the impact weather has on health, nature, history and everyday life.

programme.title: E9 - Sara’s Favourites
programme.desc: Sara lists her top 5 experiences and we see some new recipes ala Sara that she created inspired by Australia. From an eccentric pizza entrepreneur to a game of golf with kangaroos -these are Sara's favorites.

programme.title: E1 - The Great Barrier Reef
programme.desc:
World champion freediver Marina Kazankova is on a mission, to free dive the Great Barrier Reef.
Capable of holding her breath for 7-minutes at a time, Marina travels to the iconic reef, swimming with turtles and giant groper, diving on ship wrecks and through awesome caves, all on a single breath of air.
Capturing each challenge in glorious 4K, this series brings you face to face with the very best of the Great Barrier Reef’s corals and creatures.

programme.title: E2 - Twinkle Twinkle Little Star
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum is here to help you fall to sleep; with soothing, relaxing animated lullabies. These gentle and sensory videos are accompanied by lullaby versions of much loved nursery rhymes, helping to take you to the land of nod.

programme.title: E7 - Scoring Goals & Celebrations
programme.desc: Get ready to move and score with JJ and friends! Join a huge family soccer match, then test your speed with the 'Head, Shoulders, Knees, and Toes' dance. Afterward, hit the beach for a fun game of Freeze Dance and celebrate your victory!

programme.title: E4 - Buster’s Big Football Match
programme.desc: Join Buster for a big day of soccer! He's excited to play, but learns that being a team player is the real way to win. Help Buster overcome his nerves, score a goal, and show that having fun with friends is the best prize of all!

programme.title: E7 - JJ's Big Animal Adventure!
programme.desc: Go on a big animal adventure with JJ! The fun starts on Grandpa's farm, where JJ learns all about the animals & the sounds they make. He even helps give a sheep a bath! Then, it's time to head to the ocean. Join JJ & his family as they visit an aquarium & sing 'Baby Shark' with a real shark family! The adventure gets prehistoric when Ms. Appleberry teaches the class all about their favorite dinosaurs. From guessing games to meeting Bingo the dog, it's a wild day!

programme.title: E7 - Scoring Goals & Celebrations

programme.title: E6 - Calm Songs & Sweet Dreams!
programme.desc: Join Twinkle for some fun adventures & sleepy songs! First, help Twinkle find Sandy the Seagull while learning what sounds a pig, duck & cow make along the way! Then, Bunny leads Twinkle on an exciting adventure into the forest to find a mysterious box. After a long day of playing, it's time for some sleepy songs. Listen as Mr. Moon sings a soothing lullaby to help Twinkle drift off to sleep for a peaceful night's rest.

programme.title: E3 - A Big Ocean Clean Up Day!
programme.desc: Join the Shark Family as they work hard to keep the sea clean! It's a busy day with so much rubbish on the seabed. Stanley Shark becomes his heroic alter-ego, Super Shark, to show everyone how to clean up & recycle properly! The Sharksons show their creativity by using recycled materials to build an amazing underwater ball pit & slide. Plus, see them use teamwork to operate little digger trucks & even fix a broken bus wheel using a sunken bin lid!

programme.title: E329
programme.desc: Two-day road trip to the beautiful spots in all the corners of Korea! Instead of fancy studio, this on-the-road reality show takes place in the rural sides. While over 10 million Koreans travel abroad each year, the '2 Days and 1 Night' casts travel around Korea - to the mountains, farms, fishing villages, islands - where you can meet the welcoming smiles of our neighbors and the beautiful nature that cleanse our eyes.

E18 - #cancel
programme.desc: 突破傳統音樂綜藝節目模式，創新性地將舞台設立在郵輪上，從中國上海啟航，途經沖繩、越南、新加坡、馬來西亞，最終抵達香港；吸納數百名來自亞洲各國的00後新銳唱將，他們將在Jessie J、張靚穎、張信哲、尤長靖所組成的「新聲團」，及近百位亞洲各國音樂人的見證下，開啟一次巡迴亞洲的音樂競演！

programme.title: E18 - #cancel
programme.desc: 突破傳統音樂綜藝節目模式，創新性地將舞台設立在郵輪上，從中國上海啟航，途經沖繩、越南、新加坡、馬來西亞，最終抵達香港；吸納數百名來自亞洲各國的00後新銳唱將，他們將在Jessie J、張靚穎、張信哲、尤長靖所組成的「新聲團」，及近百位亞洲各國音樂人的見證下，開啟一次巡迴亞洲的音樂競演！

programme.title: E9
programme.desc: 故事取材自 1984 年的真實經歷，當時三谷寫了一部喜劇小品劇本，準備在澀谷一家脫衣舞劇院的脫衣舞表演間隙表演，以分散來檢查的警察的注意力。

programme.title: E6
programme.desc: 故事以夏日的相遇為主題，在海邊一起出生及長大的「海邊的灰姑娘」女子三人組與在東京就讀一流大學的優等生男子們相識的故事。在盛夏的海邊出現命運般的相遇，各人一起努力跨越看不見的差異，帶著複雜交錯的感情，相互交織想法一起成長。

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: 大學時期的男主角月岡夏，與同學南雲水季交往起來，並過著幸福的日子。然而，正當他們都在忙著就業活動的時候，水季卻突然向他提出分手，從此兩人分道揚鑣。就這樣過了七年，已經開展新生活的夏，卻突然收到大學時代朋友的通知，原來水季已經離開了人世。從分手那天起就沒有再見過水季的夏，帶著難以置信的心情去參加了水季的葬禮。在葬禮上，夏見到了一個名叫海的小女孩，並得知她是水季和他的女兒，讓他感到十分震驚。原來當年水季竟瞞著他生下了他們的孩子，並且一直默默地撫養著這個孩子。知道這一切以後，夏開始思考水季和海在這七年間的生活。

programme.desc: 年輕狀元郎陸江來上任淳寧縣令後屢破奇案，卻因捲入一樁殺妻舊案，從官場新星淪落至絕境。瀕死之際，幸得茶王之女榮善寶搭救。兩人聯手整頓家族、開拓茶道，在茶園裡締結了一段愛情佳話。

programme.desc: Morgan Freeman investigates a kidnapping of two girls that may involve a schizophrenic psychopath.

programme.title: Journey To The Center Of The Earth
programme.desc: Trapped in a cave, a trio’s only hope of escape is to go deep into the center of the Earth as they race against a volcanic eruption to reach the surface.

programme.title: Hustle & Flow
programme.desc: A pimp-cum-drug-dealer suffering from a mid-life crisis forms a band with his pal to reignite his passion for music.

programme.title: E2 - India
programme.desc: Joanna returns to her birthplace, India, in search of a kitchen cupboard staple once known as 'black gold'. Starting in the majestic ancient city of Hampi, she's invited to a dazzling Hindu festival.

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: Michael continues his journey into the heart of Iraq on his way to Baghdad, and arrives in Kirkuk and the exact spot where the British discovered oil in 1927, when they also ruled the country. The next day, Michael heads towards Tikrit, Saddam Hussein's hometown. Having been stopped at several military checkpoints along the way, but is surprised when he receives a warm welcome from the local commander and coins it 'Checkpoint Cheerful'.

programme.title: 72 Tenants of Prosperity
programme.desc: Past and present survival of the common man in the big city - ups and downs, laughters and tears... In 1970s Hong Kong, rapacious landlords try to evict 72 tenants but sworn brothers Ha Kugn and Shek Kin help the group of 72 defeat the landlord and landlady and coincidentally rescue Pinky from a planned forced marriage. When both sworn brothers fall for Pinky and propose to her, she flips a coin 'heads or tails' and Ha wins her hand in marriage. The sworn brothers become sworn enemies and Shek's hatred fuels intense rivalry against Ha in business dealings ranging from the manufacture of plastic flowers to the selling of stinky bean curd. Even after 40 years they continue to clash and in 2010 they are in keen competition selling electronics appliances in Sai Yeung Choi Street, Mongkok, the busiest street in the city and still home to the 72 tenants. In fiercely competitive Sai Yeung Choi Street high rents force businessmen to use every means to survive, with electronics shops

programme.title: Prison On Fire II
programme.desc: Chow Yun Fat plays a veteran inmate Chung Tin Ching. When serving his term, Ching's mother passed away his son is sent to an orphanage. When his application for leave is turned down, he breaks out of prison, further antagonizing the new Head of Security, played by Tsui Kam Kong. Chen Sung Yung plays a fellow inmate from the Mainland, Lung who befriends Ching. When he is framed for murder, Ching is implicated in fingering him. Ching and Lung must break out of prison to stay alive...

programme.title: Winners And Sinners
programme.desc: The five met in prison, Teapot, Exhaust Pipe, Vaseline, Curly Jack and Larry became friends and they would stay clean from now on. In fact they formed a cleaning company and worked hard at it after their release. Little did they realize they were released together with Boss Chan of the feared underworld who immediately reactivated his money counterfeit operation...
